title: Classification Metrics Path
description: Build fluency in Classification Metrics inside Evaluation Metrics by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Precision and Recall
steps.summary: Precision and Recall belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Start after Recall and Precision. It opens into Precision-Recall Curve and Precision Recall Tradeoff.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Precision-Recall Curve
steps.summary: Precision-Recall Curve belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Start after Precision and Recall and Recall. It opens into PR curve (Precision-Recall curve) and Area Under the Precision-Recall Curve (AUPRC).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: PR curve (Precision-Recall curve)
steps.summary: PR curve (Precision-Recall curve) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Start after Precision-Recall Curve and Precision and Recall.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Area Under the Precision-Recall Curve (AUPRC)
steps.summary: Area Under the Precision-Recall Curve (AUPRC) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Start after Precision-Recall Curve and Precision and Recall.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Anchors (High-Precision Model-Agnostic Explanations)
steps.summary: Anchors (High-Precision Model-Agnostic Explanations) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Start after Anchors and Precision.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Precision Recall Tradeoff
steps.summary: Precision Recall Tradeoff belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Start after Precision and Recall and Recall.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Recall
steps.summary: Recall belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Compare it with Precision and Recall and Perfect Recall. It opens into Average Recall and Perfect Recall.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Accuracy
steps.summary: Accuracy belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Classification Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Classification Metrics. Compare it with Top-K Accuracy and pixel accuracy. It opens into pixel accuracy and Top-K Accuracy.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
